strengths: ~15 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of GISCollective, showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise — role explicitly requires this
No evidence of director-level IC scope, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product strategy
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK usage; no deep cloud platform architecture or design fluency shown

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Principal/Director-level IC scope and external influence

response.justification: The role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, cloud strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The candidate has solid full-stack engineering breadth and roughly the required years, plus recent touchpoints with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq — but only as a contributor, not as a recognized AI builder with shipped AI platforms. Titles top out at Staff/Senior; there is no evidence of strategic advisory work, cloud product vision, or industry-level thought leadership. GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive but is a GIS platform, not an AI differentiator. Overall the profile fits a strong Staff engineer, not a Principal AI strategist.
